untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (Eve & Adam Double Bottom shape detection) requires multi-bar pattern analysis with specific geometric properties (rounded vs V-shaped bottoms, relative width comparison, twin-bottom price proximity within ~1%). This cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicator comparisons. The signal also lacks specific quantitative exit criteria (marked AUTHOR_SILENT), and volume confirmation on 'right bottom' requires identifying the second bottom bar position dynamically.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using: (1) ADX > 25 for confirmed downtrend/reversal setup, (2) price crossing above SMA-20 for breakout confirmation, (3) volume above 20-bar average for volume confirmation on breakout. However, the core pattern detection logic—identifying two distinct bottoms with similar lows, distinguishing rounded vs V-shaped morphology, and confirming the second bottom has higher volume than the first—requires pattern recognition beyond allowed indicators. Recommend implementing a custom pattern detector or using technical analysis library with shape-based pattern matching.
